title: MAS Notices 第二部分总览 / MAS Notices — Part II Overview
summary: 本章涵盖六份 MAS Notice（FAA-N02 介绍人、FAA-N10 豁免人禁止陈述、FAA-N12 临时代表入职、FAA-N14 不当行为报告、FAA-N20 平衡计分卡与 ISA Unit、FAA-N26 胜任能力与 CPD），均依《财务顾问法》(FAA) 相关条款发出，规范持牌及豁免财务顾问及其代表的行为。 / This chapter covers six MAS Notices issued under the Financial Advisers Act — FAA-N02 (introducers), FAA-N10 (prohibited representations by exempt persons), FAA-N12 (provisional representatives), FAA-N14 (misconduct reporting), FAA-N20 (balanced scorecard & ISA Unit), and FAA-N26 (competency & CPD).

sections.heading: FAA-N02 介绍人的委任与使用
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 58 条发出，适用于所有持牌财务顾问及依第 23(1)(a)–(e) 条豁免的人。"介绍活动"指把客户介绍给被介绍人以提供财务顾问服务，可附带记录客户资料并经同意转交、以及提供产品事实信息。财务顾问应采取合理步骤，不委任以介绍活动为唯一业务（公司）或全职职业（个人）的介绍人。

sections.heading: FAA-N02 Appointment and Use of Introducers
sections.body: Issued under section 58 FAA; applies to all licensed FAs and persons exempt under section 23(1)(a)–(e). "Introducing activity" means introducing a client to an introducee for financial advisory service, and may include recording and forwarding client particulars with consent and providing factual product information. The FA should take reasonable steps not to appoint an introducer whose introducing is its sole business (corporation) or full-time occupation (individual).

sections.heading: FAA-N02 财务顾问的核心义务
sections.body: 委任介绍人时须：(1) 签订书面协议并监督其在约定范围内行事；(2) 要求介绍人依 FAR 第 31 条向所有客户披露——介绍人不得就投资产品提供建议/推荐、不得推销集体投资计划、不得安排人寿保单（仅限介绍活动），及是否获报酬（如客户要求须告知金额）；(3) 提供脚本指引；(4) 确保介绍人不收受或处理客户金钱或财产；(5) 维持介绍人登记册（姓名、营业地点、联络电话、商业登记号/身份证号、委任及终止日期）。

sections.heading: FAA-N02 Core Obligations of the FA
sections.body: When appointing an introducer the FA must: (1) enter a written agreement specifying scope and monitor compliance; (2) require disclosure under FAR Reg 31 — that the introducer may not advise/recommend on investment products, market a CIS or arrange life policies beyond introducing, and whether it is remunerated (amount on client request); (3) provide a script; (4) ensure the introducer does not receive or deal with client's money or property; (5) maintain a register of introducers (names, places of business, contact numbers, business registration/IC numbers, dates of appointment and termination).

sections.heading: FAA-N10 豁免人的禁止陈述
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 58 条发出。"豁免人"指依 FAA 第 23(1)(f) 条结合 FAR 第 27(1)(d) 条豁免持牌者。此类人在每一场合就投资产品（人寿保单除外）向不超过 30 名认可投资者(accredited investors)提供建议时豁免持牌；其代表依 23B(1)(b) 条豁免须任委任/临时代表。豁免人及其代表不得以口头或书面方式表示或导致被表示自己受 MAS 发牌、规管、监督或注册。

sections.heading: FAA-N10 Prohibited Representations by Exempt Persons
sections.body: Issued under section 58 FAA. An "exempt person" is exempt from holding an FA licence under section 23(1)(f) read with FAR Reg 27(1)(d). Such persons are exempt when advising on investment products (other than life policies) to not more than 30 accredited investors on any occasion; their representatives are exempt under section 23B(1)(b) from being appointed/provisional representatives. The exempt person and its representatives must not represent, verbally or in writing, that they are licensed, regulated, supervised or registered by the MAS.

sections.heading: FAA-N12 临时代表的入职要求
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 23D 及 58 条发出。临时代表机制便利已具经验、正迁居新加坡的人，在三个月宽限期内通过相关考试（FAA-N13）前先行展业。主理人须确保拟任人满足：(a) 至少 21 岁；(b) 正在或已迁居新加坡；(c) 至少三年与所提供财务顾问服务相关的工作经验；(d) 至少学士学位或同等学历或专业资格。委任有效期为自其名列入公开代表登记册起最长三个月。

sections.heading: FAA-N12 Entry Requirements of a Provisional Representative
sections.body: Issued under sections 23D and 58 FAA. The scheme facilitates experienced individuals relocating to Singapore, allowing them a three-month grace period to pass the relevant exams (FAA-N13) while practising. The principal must ensure the individual: (a) is at least 21 years old; (b) is relocating or has relocated to Singapore; (c) has at least three years of relevant working experience; and (d) holds at least a Bachelor's degree or equivalent / professional qualification. The appointment is valid for up to three months from entry into the public register of representatives.

sections.heading: FAA-N14 代表不当行为的报告
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 58 条发出，自 2011 年 1 月 1 日生效，适用于持牌及第 23(1)(a)–(e) 条豁免财务顾问。须报告的四类不当行为：(a) 涉及欺诈/不诚实/类似罪行（应报警并向 MAS 提交报案副本）；(b) 不当建议、失实陈述或披露不足；(c) 不符合 FSG-G01 适当人选准则；(d) 其他导致违规或严重违反内部政策的不当行为。须在发现后 14 天内经 MASNET 提交不当行为报告；个案有重大进展时提交更新报告；某历年无可报告事项须在 12 月 31 日后 14 天内提交年度声明。违反第 58(5) 条罚款最高 $25,000，持续违例每日最高 $2,500。

sections.heading: FAA-N14 Reporting of Misconduct of Representatives
sections.body: Issued under section 58 FAA, effective 1 January 2011, applying to licensed FAs and persons exempt under section 23(1)(a)–(e). Four reportable misconduct types: (a) fraud/dishonesty/similar offences (lodge a police report and submit a copy to MAS); (b) inappropriate advice, misrepresentation or inadequate disclosure; (c) failure to satisfy the Fit and Proper Criteria (FSG-G01); (d) other misconduct causing regulatory non-compliance or serious breach of internal policy. A Misconduct Report must be lodged via MASNET not later than 14 days after discovery; an Update Report follows significant developments; an annual declaration is filed within 14 days after 31 December for any year with no reportable misconduct. Contravention attracts a fine up to $25,000 under section 58(5), and $2,500 per day for a continuing offence.

sections.heading: FAA-N20 平衡计分卡框架与 ISA Unit
sections.body: 依 FAA 第 38、39、58 条发出。财务顾问须设立独立销售审计(ISA)单元，其人员须独立于财务顾问服务单元、不监督相关代表、且有能力评估服务质量并判定违规(infraction)。报酬测量：仅有浮动收入者，测量浮动收入的 60% 对照非销售 KPI；有固定薪加浮动者，测量全部浮动收入。ISA 单元按抽样方法做交易后检查，第一轮抽样：被选代表(selected representative，连续两季 B 级或更差)最少 10%、仅做 DCI/结构票据滚动者最少 2%、其他代表最少 5%。违规分 Category 1（对客户利益有重大影响或影响代表适当性）与 Category 2（其余）。

sections.heading: FAA-N20 Balanced Scorecard Framework and ISA Unit
sections.body: Issued under sections 38, 39 and 58 FAA. The FA must have an Independent Sales Audit (ISA) Unit whose members are independent of the financial advisory services unit, do not supervise the relevant representatives, and are competent to assess service quality and determine infractions. Remuneration measurement: where a representative is paid variable income only, 60% of variable income is measured against the non-sales KPIs; where paid a fixed salary plus variable income, all variable income is measured. The ISA Unit conducts post-transaction checks by sampling; in the first round it samples a minimum of 10% for a selected representative (graded B or worse for two consecutive quarters), 2% for representatives doing only DCI/structured-note rollovers, and 5% for any other representative. Infractions are Category 1 (material impact on client interests or impinging on fitness/propriety) or Category 2 (all others).

sections.heading: FAA-N20 代表评级表 (Grading Table)
sections.body: 依违规案件百分比(X)或 Category 2 案件数评级并定可得特定浮动收入比例：A 级 X<5% 或 1 件 Cat-2 → 100%；B 级 5%≤X<10% 或 2 件 → 75% 至<100%；C 级 10%≤X<20% 或 3 件 → 50% 至<75%；D 级 20%≤X<30% 或 4 件 → 25% 至<50%；E 级 X≥30% 或 5 件以上 Cat-2，或一件以上 Category 1 → 0% 至<25%。任何一件 Category 1 违规即落入 E 级。

sections.heading: FAA-N20 Representatives' Grading Table
sections.body: Grades are based on the percentage (X) of cases with infractions or the number of Category 2 cases, and set the percentage of specified variable income earned: Grade A (X<5% or 1 Cat-2 case) → 100%; Grade B (5%≤X<10% or 2 cases) → 75% to <100%; Grade C (10%≤X<20% or 3 cases) → 50% to <75%; Grade D (20%≤X<30% or 4 cases) → 25% to <50%; Grade E (X≥30% or five-plus Cat-2 cases, OR one or more Category 1 cases) → 0% to <25%. A single Category 1 infraction places the representative in Grade E.

sections.heading: FAA-N26 胜任能力要求与 CPD
sections.body: 依 FAA 2001 第 23(2) 及 67 条发出，自 2024 年 4 月 1 日生效，取代原 FAA-N13。入职最低要求：至少 21 岁，并持 GCE 'A' Level、IB 文凭、新加坡理工学院文凭或同等学历（部分人豁免学历要求）。须通过 CMFAS 相关模块（含 RES5）；RES5 合格如三年内未展业或停业三年即失效。CPD：除首次受任当年外，每历年须完成最低 CPD 时数——核心(Core) 6 小时（伦理/规则与监管，或 CPF 相关课程，须经 IBF 或 SCI 认可）加补充(Supplementary)时数（按所提供服务类型，10 或 24 小时，取最高者）。不足一年者按比例计算 Pro-rated CPD。

sections.heading: FAA-N26 Competency Requirements and CPD
sections.body: Issued under sections 23(2) and 67 of the FAA 2001, effective 1 April 2024, replacing the cancelled FAA-N13. Minimum entry: at least 21 years old and holding a GCE 'A' Level, IB Diploma, a Singapore polytechnic diploma, or equivalent (some individuals are exempt from the academic requirement). The individual must pass the relevant CMFAS modules (including RES5); a pass in RES5 ceases to be valid if not used within three years of passing or after three years of cessation. CPD: apart from the first calendar year of appointment, each calendar year an appointed representative must complete minimum CPD hours — 6 Core CPD hours (ethics/rules and regulations, or a CPF-related course, accredited by IBF or SCI) plus Supplementary CPD hours (10 or 24 hours depending on the service type, taking the highest where more than one type is provided). Pro-rated CPD hours apply where appointed for less than the full year.

keyPoints: FAA-N02 介绍人须书面协议、披露(FAR Reg 31)、提供脚本、不碰客户钱财、登记册 / Introducers: written agreement, FAR Reg 31 disclosure, script, no client money, register
FAA-N10 豁免人(Reg 27(1)(d))每场合 ≤30 名认可投资者、不得自称受 MAS 发牌规管 / Exempt persons: ≤30 accredited investors per occasion; may not claim MAS licensing/regulation
FAA-N12 临时代表 21 岁、3 年经验、学士学位、3 个月有效期 / Provisional rep: 21yo, 3yrs experience, Bachelor's, 3-month validity
FAA-N14 不当行为发现后 14 天经 MASNET 报告；罚款最高 $25,000、每日 $2,500 / Misconduct reported within 14 days via MASNET; fine up to $25,000, $2,500/day
FAA-N20 ISA Unit 独立；浮动收入测量 60%；抽样 5%/2%/10%；评级 A–E / ISA Unit independent; 60% variable income measured; sampling 5%/2%/10%; grades A–E
FAA-N26 自 2024-04-01 生效；CPD 核心 6 小时 + 补充 10/24 小时；RES5 三年有效期 / Effective 2024-04-01; CPD 6 Core + 10/24 Supplementary hours; RES5 3-year validity
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.4 — MAS Notices Part II [FAA-N02; FAA-N10; FAA-N12; FAA-N14; FAA-N20; FAA-N26]
